sectionHeading.heading: Dive into Documentation
sectionHeading.subheading: From pip install to production. Guides, API references, and SDKs to start building complex communications flows.

items.title: JSON/YAML Call Flow Markup
items.description: Define complex communication flows declaratively with SWML. The SignalWire Markup Language has built-in methods for voice, video, messaging, and AI - all single events or statically generated or statically served.

items.title: Protocol-Agnostic API Access
items.description: Connect to SignalWire using whatever fits your architecture. REST for simple requests, WebSockets for real-time events, GraphQL for flexible queries, or direct database/PIs for peer-to-peer data.

items.title: CPaaS Primitives
items.description: Every carrier feature is exposed as simple APIs. Send an SMS with one API call, make a phone call with another. Standard CPaaS functionality you expect to be provided out-of-the-box by the FreeSWITCH team.

items.title: Call Center Infrastructure as Code
items.description: Define complex communication flows declaratively with SWML. The SignalWire Markup Language has built-in methods for voice, video, messaging, and AI - all single events or statically generated or statically served.
